steps.title: Locate the definition clue
steps.content: The colon after the blank signals that what follows defines it. The following clause says the delta is “a constantly evolving network of channels …” — the key clue is the phrase “constantly evolving.”

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Dynamic means constantly changing or evolving, which directly matches the clue “constantly evolving.” The other choices either suggest unchangeableness, lack of change, or unrelated ideas, so they do not fit the context. That matches choice A — A is correct.
